response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the description in the reference JSON regarding announcements and the outro. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was used for context (song title 'ENCOUNT', membership info); transcription and translation were done manually as no lyrics were provided. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed speech to exact vocal start/end points. Handled bilingual transitions (English/Japanese) by maintaining semantic flow. Included a subtitle for the prominent visual title card at the end during instrumental music.
